_about: Single source of truth for subagent/workflow/invoke model selection. Consumers (opus-guard.py, workflow-model-guard.py, gen-invoke-commands.py, prompt_router/modules/model_advice.py) each fail OPEN to their own hardcoded defaults if this file is missing or corrupt. Sonnet is the default; Opus is reserved for UI/UX + heavy/complex work + the IMPLEMENT suite; Fable is the standing default for specialist agents + invoke acts (user directive 2026-07-18: "use fable for everything"); sonnet remains for cheap search helpers.

agent_pins._comment: subagent_type -> forced model. 2026-07-18 user directive: fable for everything — implementor/design agents pinned fable; explore/guide stay sonnet (cheap searches).

task_matrix._comment: TaskProfile intent -> model (consumed by /invoke categories and the router's model_advice; the Agent-tool opus-guard has no TaskProfile so it skips this step). Anything unlisted -> default (sonnet). Fable never appears here.

heavy_qualifiers._comment: HEAVY_ARCHITECTURE / DEEP_DEBUG promote to opus only when size:L AND risk>=2 in the TaskProfile — a keyword alone never promotes.

invoke_categories._comment: 2026-07-18 user directive: fable for everything — all substantive acts run fable.

override_phrases._comment: Explicit user phrases in the prompt that force a model for that turn.

session_flags._comment: Flag files under ~/.claude/<dir>/; presence forces that model on every subagent/workflow agent. Precedence sonnet > opus > fable (sonnet is the kill-switch).

main_session_advice._comment: Inverted from the old opus-bias: advise /model opus ONLY when the TaskProfile hits an opus row of task_matrix AND heavy_qualifiers pass. Otherwise silent (no per-prompt /model nag). Consumed by prompt_router/modules/model_advice.py (P2-T4, filled once P1 lands the router core).
